skills.name: diagnose
skills.reason: High-frequency disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and regressions.

skills.name: grill-with-docs
skills.reason: Matt's recommended engineering alignment skill; pairs requirements grilling with project language and ADR updates.

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.reason: Very high-frequency architecture-deepening workflow for large Rust codebases.

skills.name: prototype
skills.reason: Matt's current throwaway prototype skill for shaping uncertain designs.

skills.name: setup-matt-pocock-skills
skills.reason: Matt recommends running this once per repo so issue tracker and project doc conventions are explicit.

skills.name: tdd
skills.reason: High-frequency red-green-refactor workflow for tests-first implementation.

skills.name: to-issues
skills.reason: Matt's vertical-slice issue breakdown skill; useful when CE plans should become tracker work.

skills.name: to-prd
skills.reason: Matt's PRD synthesis skill; included with the Matt default set even though recent usage is low.

skills.name: triage
skills.reason: Matt's issue-triage state machine; keep with setup-matt-pocock-skills.

skills.name: zoom-out
skills.reason: Frequently used broader-context analysis helper.

skills.name: last30days
skills.reason: Research what people actually said about a topic across social and web sources in the last 30 days.

skills.name: logo-generator
skills.reason: Generate SVG logo variants, PNG exports, and polished showcase pages or images for product and brand concepts.

skills.name: caveman
skills.reason: Matt's current productivity skill for ultra-compressed communication.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.reason: Matt's general-purpose alignment interview skill.

skills.name: handoff
skills.reason: Matt's compact handoff skill for transferring context between agents or sessions.

skills.name: teach
skills.reason: Matt's new teaching skill added on origin/main; explicitly requested for this repository.

skills.name: write-a-skill
skills.reason: Matt's current skill-authoring workflow; useful for maintaining this repository.

skills.name: review
skills.reason: Upstream is still in-progress; use Codex's built-in review stance or CE code review instead.

skills.name: design-an-interface
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; do not vendor by default.

skills.name: qa
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; GitHub issue QA flow is product-specific.

skills.name: request-refactor-plan
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; prefer CE plans or direct architecture work.

skills.name: ubiquitous-language
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; grill-with-docs now covers shared language work.

skills.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
skills.reason: Claude Code hook setup is not a Codex workflow requirement.

skills.name: migrate-to-shoehorn
skills.reason: Niche Total TypeScript migration helper; install only when needed.

skills.name: scaffold-exercises
skills.reason: Course exercise scaffold is not part of this default Rust skill set.

skills.name: setup-pre-commit
skills.reason: Project-specific frontend hook setup; install only when needed.

skills.name: ce-brainstorm
skills.reason: Prefer installing the full Compound Engineering plugin; this skill depends on the CE workflow and agent set.

skills.name: ce-plan
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE planning skill instead of vendoring plugin internals.

skills.name: ce-work
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE execution skill; direct vendoring would lose related agents.

skills.name: ce-code-review
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE review skill; its strongest behavior relies on CE reviewer agents.

skills.name: ce-compound
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE knowledge-capture skill after verified fixes.
